title: EssentialsX AntiBuild
description: The permission-based interactions control module for EssentialsX. (requires main module)
body:
**EssentialsX AntiBuild** adds permissions to your server that gives you fine control over which players can build, interact with blocks or craft on your server. You can control individual items and blocks for specific groups or users, or simply allow or deny entire groups from building at all using build flags. It also includes an alert system for when players use certain items.

For more information, see the [Essentials 2 wiki page for AntiBuild](http://wiki.mc-ess.net/wiki/AntiBuild) - though note that item IDs have been replaced with item names from 1.13 onwards.

You need a matching version of the [main EssentialsX module](https://modrinth.com/plugin/essentialsx) to use this addon module, as well as [Vault](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/) and a supported permissions plugin such as [LuckPerms](https://modrinth.com/plugin/luckperms) to make the most use of AntiBuild.
